posts.author: Rodion (Rodion Iavelov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I’m Rodion from Timelines.ai team. Our product helps automate and make for a more efficient the use of Whatsapp for business.

We’re researching a possibility of adding a Whatsapp messaging feature when automating notifications on Monday.com.

If you are interested in this integration with Whatsapp, please tell us:

— How do you use Gmail or SMS notification automation feature on Monday.com?
— Would you use Whatsapp notifications? If yes, how?
— What problem would such integration help you solve?

I would appreciate hearing from you!
